description_long: This object is a wristwatch with a dark, likely metallic or plastic case and a matching strap. The watch features a round central case with a smooth, slightly domed crystal covering the dial. The strap appears to be flexible, possibly made of rubber or silicone, and is attached to the case with visible lugs. The buckle is a classic tang style, visible at the end of the strap. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality. No visible brand logo or intricate dial details are apparent from the images.
description: A modern wristwatch with a dark round case and a matching flexible strap, featuring a simple, functional design and a classic buckle closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the watch face and the full width of the strap, with the buckle end not visible.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the thinness of the watch case and the full length of the strap laid flat.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the watch case and the strap's buckle, with the strap tip not visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the case thickness and the strap's length, with the buckle end visible.
attribute_dial_design: The dial design is not clearly visible, but appears to be plain and minimalist with no visible numerals, indices, or decorative elements.
attribute_strap_type: Flexible rubber or silicone strap with a smooth texture and classic design.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with a round face, but no visible hands, markers, or complications are discernible.
